description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden template job .deprecated_tpl with an after_script that prints red‑colored warning emojis, announces the deprecation of the template directory, shows the old and new directory variables, resets the color and exits with status 1, and is allowed to fail. Define pipeline variables tpl_baseurl, tpl_directory_old, and tpl_include_dir that reference the current branch and the template directory. Add a job named "warning move templates dir" that extends the .deprecated_tpl template (via .warning) and sets a variable message containing the deprecation notice using ${tpl_directory_old} and ${tpl_directory}. The job runs in the default stage, uses no specific Docker image or services, and inherits the after_script behavior. Ensure the pipeline only emits the warning and does not block the pipeline because allow_failure is true.
